notes:
v0.6.35: right-click silent send tries P2P first

Files up to 100 MB sent via right-click -> Send to Friend now go peer-to-peer when both users are online. Zero S3 egress, real-time delivery, sender's 'Sent' toast fires only after bytes have actually landed. Falls back to S3 automatically when recipient is offline or P2P fails. Larger files still take the streaming queue path until send-side streaming lands.
